title: 1.21 Panorama Ladder Fix
description: A fix to add a missing asymmetrical ladder to the 1.21 title screen panorama.
body:
# How this was made
I edited (photoshoped) the panorama, to include the missing ladder, making sure that it matched the lighting, position, and rotation, to make it look like it's actully there.

I didn't actually rebuild the sceen from the panorama, to fully retake it, just edited it.

![With / Without the Resource Pack comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66d1697cd648b27ed5a3bc238521f647e05df21.png)
